Confidence at every turn
Increase your competitive advantage across the industries we all depend on with Trimble connected hardware and software solutions. Turn to Trimble for the win.
WHAT WE DO
Accelerating the pace of work across the world's essential industries
Trimble connected solutions give you a better way to work. Whether you design and construct buildings, operate and maintain infrastructure, optimize global supply chains or map the world, Trimble keeps your projects moving.

Ready. Set. Turn!
Work doesn't flow in a straight line.

about.text:
About Trimble | Transforming the way the world works
Skip to content
About Trimble
A company driven by purpose
Trimble is grounded in our ability to invent and deliver technology solutions that give our customers the power to keep work moving forward.
Our mission
Since Charlie Trimble founded the company in 1978, Trimble has pursued a mission to transform the way the world works. Our customers are vital to the world's most essential industries—from building and maintaining our infrastructure to moving goods across global supply chains to measuring and mapping the world around us. Trimble products and services connect the physical and digital worlds, creating a better way for our customers to get hard work done.
Community
11,000+
employees in 40+ countries make up our global network of local support
Expertise
45+
years of industry expertise and unmatched technology leadership
Innovation
1,000+
unique and active patents show our commitment to innovation
Trimble newsroom
OUR LEADERSHIP
Setting the strategy for today—driving the innovation of tomorrow
CEO Legacy
Our History
AI at Trimble
How do you build and grow a global technology company? According to Trimble's past and present CEOs, it's all about leadership, resilience and growth.
Learn how the strategies and foresight of Charlie Trimble, Steve Berglund and current CEO Rob Painter have guided Trimble on its mission of transforming the way the world works.
Executive leaders
Board of directors
OUR VALUES
Belong. Grow. Innovate.
Our values are the central, underlying philosophies that guide our interactions with each other and how we do business. They create a foundation for inclusivity and influence the way we interact with each other, partners, customers and stakeholders.
Our code of conduct
Be yourself and thrive together
We believe in a culture where you feel like you belong. With empathy, compassion and trust, we embrace our diversity and thrive through inclusivity.
Be yourself and thrive together
We believe in a culture where you feel like you belong. With empathy, compassion and trust, we embrace our diversity and thrive through inclusivity.
Be intentional and humble
Our growth mindset drives us to deliver value for the planet, and our humility enables us to better ourselves and the communities we serve.
Be intentional and humble
Our growth mindset drives us to deliver value for the planet, and our humility enables us to better ourselves and the communities we serve.
Be curious and solve problems
With an innovative mindset, we are always exploring creative ways to solve complex problems and provide new value to our customers.
Be curious and solve problems
With an innovative mindset, we are always exploring creative ways to solve complex problems and provide new value to our customers.
Making an impact
At Trimble, we are committed to shaping a better future for our customers, our employees and our planet.
Shaping a sustainable future
Our sustainability priorities are integrated into our strategy. They drive us to build resilience, empower our people, and lead with integrity in all that we do.
Driving accelerated decarbonization
The impacts of climate change are evident and widespread, and Trimble is taking urgent steps to drive decarbonization across our value chain, from our suppliers to our customers.
Welcoming new perspectives
By celebrating our differences, we open the way for innovation and cultivate a culture that inspires and engages all employees to achieve their full potential.
Increasing access to opportunity
We work with academic institutions, nonprofits, trade schools and unions to provide the skills and experience for technology-based careers that will positively impact the industries we serve.
Building stronger and more equitable communities
We connect our people, capital, and solutions to global community needs. We do this work through the Trimble Foundation with the goal of building more resilient outcomes for all.
Our foundation
Awards & Recognition

contact_page.text:
Contact Trimble
Skip to content
Connect with Trimble’s teams
Choose a link below to get support, find information or ask us questions.
How can we help you?
Customer support
Contact our support team for answers to questions about orders, billing or products.
Authorized dealers
Trimble sells directly and through our global network of dealers, who are ready to answer questions and provide product and pricing details.
Trimble extended protection
Want to learn more about Trimble extended protection? Contact our Trimble Protected sales team with any questions.
Repair services
Get access to repair services including preventive maintenance, adjustments, full calibration and cleaning.
Investor relations
Get contact information for investor-related questions, shareholder inquiries or other stock account matters.
Media inquiries
Contact Trimble public relations for media inquiries or to request information for journalists and editors.
Global locations
Trimble is headquartered in Westminster, Colorado in the United States, where we serve customers around the globe. Our offices, fulfillment centers, manufacturing, services, research and development (R&D) centers, and related facilities total more than 150 locations worldwide in over 30 countries.
